title: blaeria setulosa
intro: Blaeria setulosa, also known as the hair fringe bladderwort or fringe bladderwort, is a species of carnivorous plant in the family Lentibulariaceae. It is native to the western coast of Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Blaeria setulosa include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and potentially fighting off infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is often used in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions.
